data.content: Implemented history console search refinements: replaced message-type chip filters with a dropdown multiselect, added workflow step filters using queue/action pairs, and wired filtering to session workflow states derived from beat_state log entries (with text fallback for older logs). Added agent-history parsing/test coverage for workflowStates and hardened terminal-store tests for Node partial localStorage. Validated with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and NODE_ENV=production bun run build.
